dva.name: D.Va
dva.overview: D.Va is a mobile frontline tank who dives targets, peels for allies, and repositions quickly with her mech.
dva.abilities: She uses Boosters for engages, Defense Matrix to deny projectiles, Micro Missiles for burst, and Self-Destruct to force space.
dva.playstyle_tags: mobile tank dive fast agile mech missiles self-destruct defense matrix
dva.combined_text: D.Va is a Tank hero. D.Va is a mobile frontline tank who dives targets, peels for allies, and repositions quickly with her mech. She uses Boosters for engages, Defense Matrix to deny projectiles, Micro Missiles for burst, and Self-Destruct to force space. Playstyle: mobile tank dive fast agile mech missiles self-destruct defense matrix

doomfist.name: Doomfist
doomfist.overview: Doomfist is a high-mobility tank that starts fights aggressively and disrupts enemy positioning.
doomfist.abilities: His kit combines Rocket Punch, Seismic Slam, and Power Block to create openings, then Meteor Strike to finish or escape.
doomfist.playstyle_tags: dive melee brawl punch aggressive high mobility seismic slam
doomfist.combined_text: Doomfist is a Tank hero. Doomfist is a high-mobility tank that starts fights aggressively and disrupts enemy positioning. His kit combines Rocket Punch, Seismic Slam, and Power Block to create openings, then Meteor Strike to finish or escape. Playstyle: dive melee brawl punch aggressive high mobility seismic slam

hazard.name: Hazard
hazard.overview: Hazard is a disruptive tank focused on controlling angles and punishing enemies in tight spaces.
hazard.abilities: He mixes zone-control tools with short-range pressure to isolate targets and hold contested objectives.
hazard.playstyle_tags: area control spikes barrier tank leap
hazard.combined_text: Hazard is a Tank hero. Hazard is a disruptive tank focused on controlling angles and punishing enemies in tight spaces. He mixes zone-control tools with short-range pressure to isolate targets and hold contested objectives. Playstyle: area control spikes barrier tank leap

junker-queen.name: Junker Queen
junker-queen.overview: Junker Queen is a brawl tank who thrives in close-range fights and sustained pressure.
junker-queen.abilities: She applies wounds with her knife and abilities, speeds her team with Commanding Shout, and wins attrition with aggressive tempo.
junker-queen.playstyle_tags: aggressive melee bleed wound close range shout commanding
junker-queen.combined_text: Junker Queen is a Tank hero. Junker Queen is a brawl tank who thrives in close-range fights and sustained pressure. mauga.abilities: He alternates and combines dual chainguns, uses mobility to force fights, and overwhelms teams in extended engagements.
mauga.playstyle_tags: aggressive dual minigun healblock tank brawl overrun
mauga.combined_text: Mauga is a Tank hero. Mauga is a brawling tank built for sustained frontline damage and close-range pressure. orisa.abilities: She pokes at range, uses Fortify for survivability, and controls engages with javelin-based displacement.
orisa.playstyle_tags: anchor tank fortify javelin spear long range poke pull
orisa.combined_text: Orisa is a Tank hero. Orisa is an anchor tank who stabilizes space and resists crowd control in frontline battles. ramattra.abilities: He controls lanes with barrier and ranged pressure, then transforms to Nemesis Form for close-range durability and damage.
